overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game (Starfield), showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an industrial interior with stone walls and metal walkways. The character ascends a staircase, crosses an upper catwalk past barred security gates, and descends to a lower level with office desks and NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor office with desk and staircase

events.description: character begins ascending the metal staircase

agents.ego_description: walking from the desk area toward the staircase and climbing the metal stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: sitting at a desk working on a computer

entered.detail: wooden desk cluttered with papers and office supplies
metal staircase with yellow safety railings leading upward
green and yellow dartboard mounted on the stone wall
metal pipes running along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character starts in a dimly lit industrial office space with stone walls and a wooden desk. An NPC sits working in the background as the character approaches and begins climbing a metal staircase with yellow railings, passing a green dartboard on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal catwalk with security barriers

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper catwalk level

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated metal catwalk past barred security gates

entered.detail: metal grated walkway with yellow railings overlooking the lower level
metal barred gate blocking off a storage or cell area

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character walks along a narrow metal catwalk with industrial pipes lining the walls. To the right, barred security gates block off sections of the upper level, while the main staircase falls behind on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase returning to ground floor

events.description: character turns and begins descending the return staircase

agents.ego_description: turning around at the end of the catwalk and descending the metal stairs back to the ground floor

entered.detail: metal staircase with railings descending to the right side of the room

segments.scene_description: At the end of the catwalk, the character turns and descends a second metal staircase on the opposite side of the room. The upper level with its security gates falls behind as the character returns to the ground floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor office area with exit door

agents.ego_description: walking across the ground floor toward a metal exit door, passing an NPC working at a desk

notable_agents.action: standing near a desk organizing items

entered.detail: large metal door with industrial locking mechanism at the end of the room
wooden desk with computer terminal and storage boxes

segments.scene_description: Back on the carpeted ground floor, the character walks toward a large metal exit door. An NPC stands near a desk on the right side, and the staircases are now behind as the character approaches the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial interior that ascends to a high catwalk before returning to a ground-floor exit. It begins in an office space with stone walls and a wooden desk, moving past a working NPC and a green dartboard as the character climbs a metal staircase with yellow railings. As the character reaches the upper level, the scene shifts to a narrow metal catwalk lined with industrial pipes and barred security gates. The camera then follows the character as they turn and descend a second staircase on the opposite side of the room, leaving the upper catwalk behind. Finally, the movement returns to the carpeted ground floor, passing another NPC at a desk before approaching a large metal exit door.
